DP_Private.questDescriptionRules.rulesSt.li: questDescription-> A private island owned by an offworld MegaCorp executive. Though the executive only works in middle management, his villa still is likely to contain a great deal of valuables, arts, and treasures hidden from prying eyes.\n\nThe island is fortified and guarded by a small mercenary contingent tasked with fending off raider rabble like yourself.
